unresolved_owner_decisions: Verify whether neutral prayer/worship symbols require a specialized custom SVG or if generic sunrise is acceptable.
Decide if expansion joint line markings should be customized or standard dashed double-lines.
Resolve whether level of detail (LoD) threshold sliders are standard or advanced configurations.

drawable_symbols.name: Dining Space
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates dining space layouts, seating groups, and food service zones.

drawable_symbols.name: Office Workspace
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks dedicated workspace, offices, administrative areas, or business functions.

drawable_symbols.name: Classroom
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks educational spaces, classrooms, lecture halls, or seminar rooms.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing civic (Landmark) and school (School) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Studio
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks creative studios, design labs, digital workspaces, or control booths.

drawable_symbols.name: Workshop
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates fabrication labs, maker spaces, woodshops, or manual work zones.

drawable_symbols.name: Retail Store
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks shopping areas, commercial retail spaces, storefronts, or markets.

drawable_symbols.name: Lobby
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates building entrance lobbies, waiting areas, or front desks.

drawable_symbols.name: Reception Desk
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks service counters, check-in points, or administrative desks.

drawable_symbols.name: Storage Room
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates closets, stockrooms, archive spaces, or general storage facilities.

drawable_symbols.name: Utility Room
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks laundry rooms, back-of-house service, janitorial closets, or plant support.

drawable_symbols.name: Single Bedroom
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Differentiates single occupancy rooms, dormitories, or guest bedrooms.

drawable_symbols.name: Toilet / WC
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates water closets, public toilets, or compact washrooms.

drawable_symbols.name: Meeting Room
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks conference rooms, collaborative hubs, boardrooms, or team tables.

drawable_symbols.name: Cafe
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks office breakrooms, coffee bars, public cafes, or lounges.

drawable_symbols.name: Closed Door
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates emergency exits, locked rooms, or restricted access doors.

drawable_symbols.name: Direction Down
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates downward circulation, down stairs, or egress descent.

drawable_symbols.name: Direction Left
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates leftward circulation direction or emergency egress route.

drawable_symbols.name: Direction Up Right
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates diagonal ascent, ramps, stairs, or escalators in plan.

drawable_symbols.name: Direction Down Right
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates diagonal descent, access ramps, or escape slopes in plan.

drawable_symbols.name: Vertical Ascent
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks rapid vertical transition points like elevators, lift shafts, or express stairs.

drawable_symbols.name: Vertical Descent
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks rapid vertical egress points, elevator drops, or chute exits.

drawable_symbols.name: Movement Hub
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates circulation nodes, corridors crossings, or major vertical/horizontal distribution halls.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to Target (Crosshair) and Movement Arrow (MoveRight) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Table Layout
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates structural table elements, workstations, or dining arrangements.

drawable_symbols.name: Desk Workstation
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks hot-desks, personal laptop space, study carrels, or office desking.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to studio (Monitor) and workstation (Computer) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Wardrobe / Storage Clos
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks lockers, wardrobes, custom joinery, or built-in closets.

drawable_symbols.name: Shower
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates shower stalls, locker room facilities, or wet area layouts.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to bathroom (Bath) and toilet (Toilet) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Appliance: Microwave
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks kitchenette counter appliances or office pantry equipment.

drawable_symbols.name: Appliance: Fridge
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates commercial or domestic refrigerator nodes in kitchen designs.

drawable_symbols.name: TV / Display Panel
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates wall-mounted TV screens, presentation displays in meeting rooms, or monitors.

drawable_symbols.name: Computer Workstation
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks CAD stations, dedicated desktop workstations, or IT labs.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to desk (Laptop) and studio (Monitor) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Garden
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks decorative garden beds, flower planting, or sensory courtyards.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing landscape flower (Flower2) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Deciduous Tree
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates deciduous (broadleaf) trees on site plans for seasonal sun analysis.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing pine tree (TreePine) and forest (Trees) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Palm Tree
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates palm trees in warm or coastal climate landscape layouts.

drawable_symbols.name: Outdoor Shelter
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates temporary structures, event tents, or campsite locations.

drawable_symbols.name: Water Waves
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates larger open water bodies, rivers, coastal zones, or major water movement.

drawable_symbols.name: Fire Extinguisher
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates locations of wall-mounted fire extinguishers or fire cabinets.

drawable_symbols.name: Smoke Alarm / Sensor
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks ceiling-mounted smoke detectors or fire alarm system nodes.

drawable_symbols.name: Waste Receptacle
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks garbage collections, waste rooms, or trash bins in public areas.

drawable_symbols.name: Recycling Node
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks sorting bins, recycling cabinets, or ecological waste collection spaces.

drawable_symbols.name: Access Restricted (Lock)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks rooms requiring card key access, mechanical keys, or high-security vaults.

drawable_symbols.name: Access Granted (Unlock)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks public doors, override bypasses, or egress routes that unlock during emergency.

drawable_symbols.name: Audible Alarm / Bell
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates warning bells, intercom chimes, or audio alert speakers.

drawable_symbols.name: Active Alarm Bell
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks active sirens, school bells, or sounders that ring continuously.

drawable_symbols.name: Hazard Indicator
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks high-voltage zones, steps, low ceilings, or dangerous machinery zones.

drawable_symbols.name: Dashboard Gauge
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks monitoring dials, pressure valves, water meters, or HVAC gauges.

drawable_symbols.name: Security Key
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks key-locked services, electric risers, control panels, or janitorial locks.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to Lock and Unlock symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Construction Zone
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks hardhat zones, construction staging, manual labor workshops, or safety lockers.

drawable_symbols.name: Acoustic Source
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks noise sources, mechanical equipment, public address speakers, or zones of high acoustic emission.

drawable_symbols.name: High Noise Level
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks construction zones, alarms, engine rooms, or areas requiring hearing protection.

drawable_symbols.name: Quiet Zone
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks study areas, meditation rooms, library floors, or areas requiring low ambient noise.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing accessibility hearing (Ear) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Assistance Info Point
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks help desks, tourist info, guest relations, or accessibility support points.

drawable_symbols.name: Low Vision Access
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks tactile floor maps, braille signs, audio guide points, or visually accessible paths.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation view (Eye) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Wellness / First Aid
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks wellness rooms, first-aid posts, prayer rooms, or care facilities.

drawable_symbols.name: Vehicular Road
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates driving lanes, fire truck access roads, loading driveways, or public streets.

drawable_symbols.name: Bicycle Lane
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks bicycle parking racks, shower lockers, cycle lanes, or bike pathways.

drawable_symbols.name: Bus Stop / Station
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks public transit bus stops, shuttle docks, or bus stations on site layouts.

drawable_symbols.name: Railway / Transit Node
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates railway alignments, subway station entries, metro links, or light rail stops.

drawable_symbols.name: Loading Dock / Truck
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates back-of-house loading docks, delivery areas, freight elevators, or logistics ports.

drawable_symbols.name: Ferry / Boat Dock
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks public ferries, boat berths, marina docks, or canal transport stops.

drawable_symbols.name: Airport / Heliport
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks helipads, airport connections, or general aviation terminals in urban context.

drawable_symbols.name: Map Location
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks location of directory boards, map displays, or physical town planning landmarks.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing wayfinding signpost (Signpost) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Fixed Anchor
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates pinned nodes, reference points, structural anchors, or unmovable constraints.

drawable_symbols.name: Relationship Link
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks close adjacency requirements, structural connections, or programmatic relationships.

drawable_symbols.name: Broken Relationship
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates programmatic separation requirements, acoustic isolation zones, or avoid constraints.

drawable_symbols.name: Merge Flow
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates convergence of foot traffic, water drainage channels, or mechanical ducts.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to split (Split) and branch (GitBranch) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Split Flow
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates divergence of programmatic paths, pedestrian choice points, or duct distribution.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to merge (Merge) and branch (GitBranch) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Dispersion Flow
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates random mixing zones, public squares with cross-circulation, or flexible layouts.

drawable_symbols.name: Union Combine
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks merged programmatic functions, shared zones, or unified site elements.

drawable_symbols.name: Hierarchy Tree
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates zoning hierarchies, structural load-bearing paths, or departmental organization.

drawable_symbols.name: Zoning Grid
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks grid-based planning structures, structural bays, modular layouts, or zones.

drawable_symbols.name: Geometric Grid
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks module alignments, construction grid lines, or technical drawing references.

drawable_symbols.name: Alternate North Arrow
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: An alternative North arrow design showing site bearing or solar orientation.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation north (Navigation) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Milestone Flag
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks project checkpoints, property corners, site survey markers, or phase targets.

drawable_symbols.name: Metadata Tag
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks space category labels, occupant ID designations, or schedule keys in drawings.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation area-tag (ScanText) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Drawing Pin
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Pins comments, annotations, visual references, or details to specific coordinates.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing wayfinding location (MapPin) symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Saved Bookmark
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks key rooms for client presentations, highlights areas for review, or saves spaces.

drawable_symbols.name: Sticky Note
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks design feedback notes, coordinator comments, or client change requests on layout.

drawable_symbols.name: Sketch Pencil
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates hand-drawn sketch overlays, coordinator markup, or designer changes.

drawable_symbols.name: Numbered Marker
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks door numbers, window schedule indexes, partition types, or item counts.

drawable_symbols.name: Footnote / Reference
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Links plan drawing coordinates to written specification notes or local guidelines.

drawable_symbols.name: Info Bullet
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks space specifications, occupancy rules, structural notes, or user guidance.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Similar to existing accessibility help (CircleQuestionMark) and assistance-point (HelpCircle) symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: WC (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:toilet for architectural standardization.

drawable_symbols.name: Dining Room (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:dining.

drawable_symbols.name: Living Space (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:living.

drawable_symbols.name: Bed (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:bedroom.

drawable_symbols.name: Kitchen (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:kitchen.

drawable_symbols.name: Office (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:office.

drawable_symbols.name: Elevator (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:chevrons-up or custom elevator symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Escalator (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:up-right or custom escalator symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Car Parking (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:parking.

drawable_symbols.name: Pedestrian (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:walking.

drawable_symbols.name: Air Conditioning (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:environmental:cold.

drawable_symbols.name: Heating (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:environmental:heat.

drawable_symbols.name: WiFi Connectivity (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:service:connectivity.

drawable_symbols.name: Power Outlet (Alias)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:service:electrical.

drawable_symbols.name: Circulation Step Forward
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Intended for circulation segments but resembles standard player media controls too closely.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Looks like software UI controls, not floor plan circulation.

drawable_symbols.name: Circulation Step Back
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Intended for reverse circulation segments but resembles standard player media controls too closely.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Looks like software UI controls, not floor plan circulation.

drawable_symbols.name: Sunlight (Duplicate)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Near duplicate of environmental:sun which uses SunMedium. Keep one canonical sun symbol.

drawable_symbols.name: Shared Connection
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Intended for joint links, but is too software-centric and easily confused with web application UI shares.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Conflicts with application shell share icons.

drawable_symbols.name: Pizza Section (Duplicate)
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: The slice icon (looks like a pizza slice) is highly non-standard for drafting sections. Needs custom drafting marker.

drawable_symbols.name: Elevator Lift Cab
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates elevator shafts with cab outline in floor plan drawings. Lucide has no elevator cab symbol.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Lucide has only Forklift or ChevronsUp. Custom path required.

drawable_symbols.name: Stairs Plan View
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Standard architectural symbol for stairs showing treads and exit direction arrow. Existing stairs (BetweenVerticalStart) is non-standard.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Lucide lacks stairs plan symbol. Existing stairs symbol is a technical workaround.

drawable_symbols.name: Escalator Section
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates escalator paths in shopping malls or transit hubs. Lucide lacks escalator symbols.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Lucide has no escalator symbols. Custom path needed.

drawable_symbols.name: Wardrobe Plan Outline
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Architectural floor plan symbol for wardrobes: rectangle with clothes hanger or crossed dash lines.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: None. Lucide has only folder/archive drawers.

drawable_symbols.name: Plumbing: Sink Layout
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Plan view of single/double bowl sinks with tap indicators for kitchen counters or vanity units.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Lucide has no sink/basin symbols. Custom path required.

drawable_symbols.name: Fence Gate Swing
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Standard plan symbol for double-swing vehicular gates or single pedestrian gates on boundaries.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: None. Lucide has no fence gate swing symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Floor Drainage Drain
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Standard architectural symbol for floor waste drain (circle with center dot and radiating lines or grid).
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: None. Lucide lacks floor drain symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Architectural Section Cut
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Standard architectural drafting section cut symbol (circle head with orientation pointer and cut line). Existing slice is non-standard.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Lucide has only pizza slice (Slice) or scissors, both inappropriate. Custom design required.

drawable_symbols.name: Structural Column
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Represents columns, load-bearing piers, or structural grid intersection members.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Do not confuse with generic UI dots or Core presentation elements.

drawable_symbols.name: Structural Beam
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates overhead beams, transfer girders, or floor framing joist directions.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must not look like standard cell boundaries; represented as dashed parallel lines.

drawable_symbols.name: Shear Wall Section
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates structural shear walls, core wall sections, or massive partition plans.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must be visually distinct from single line boundaries; uses double parallel lines with hatch.

drawable_symbols.name: Urinal Plan View
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates wall-mounted urinal fixture placements in commercial washrooms.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Avoid confusion with standard toilets or sinks; must show the clear projection cup.

drawable_symbols.name: Bathtub Plan
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Outlines bathtub layout locations in residential and hotel washrooms.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Do not confuse with simple rectangular tables. Must include drain circle and bevel edge.

drawable_symbols.name: Electrical Panel
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks distribution boards, electrical panels, and service switchboards.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must follow standard symbol: rectangle divided diagonally, one half solid black.

drawable_symbols.name: HVAC Supply Diffuser
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks supply air diffusers and grilles on reflected ceiling or mechanical plans.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Avoid collision with simple crosshairs. Square with a smaller square and arrows.

drawable_symbols.name: HVAC Return Grille
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks return or exhaust air grilles on reflected ceiling/MEP plans.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must follow standard: square with a single diagonal slash, indicating return.

drawable_symbols.name: Fire Sprinkler
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks automatic fire sprinkler heads on life safety and MEP layouts.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Small size readability is critical; represented as circle with small outer ticks.

drawable_symbols.name: Dining Table Plan
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Shows dining furniture arrangements, spacing, and circulation requirements.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Do not confuse with a spreadsheet table. Must show table outline with perimeter chairs.

drawable_symbols.name: Kitchen Counter and Sink
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates kitchen pantry worktops, built-in sinks, and appliance layouts.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must not look like a simple office desk. Must show faucet and basin outlines.

drawable_symbols.name: Access Ramp Plan
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates changes in level with handicap access ramps and slope arrows.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must show gradient arrow starting from low point pointing up.

drawable_symbols.name: Park Bench Plan
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Outlines park benches, urban furniture, and public plaza seating groups.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Avoid collision with simple wall segments. Must show backrest and armrest slats.

drawable_symbols.name: Security Bollard
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks traffic control bollards, security posts, and pedestrian zone protection.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Do not confuse with structural columns. Typically drawn as small circle with cross mark.

drawable_symbols.name: Fence Line Layout
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Outlines boundary fences, perimeter screens, or balustrades.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must look like standard fence notation (a line with regular cross marks).

drawable_symbols.name: Healthcare Clinic
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks medical rooms, nursing stations, wellness rooms, or first-aid zones.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Avoid mixing with accessibility heart or help symbols.

drawable_symbols.name: Industrial Facility
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Marks plant rooms, manufacturing floors, warehouse zones, and heavy services.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must look industrial, with saw-tooth factory roof silhouette.

drawable_symbols.name: Quiet Sanctuary / Worship
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates multi-faith prayer rooms, meditation spaces, or quiet sanctuaries.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Must remain neutral. Do not use church, mosque, or specific religious silhouettes.

drawable_symbols.name: Elevation Level Marker
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Indicates finished floor levels, datums, or heights in section/elevation views.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Technical drafting representation. Quarters filled black/white diagonally.

drawable_symbols.name: Elevation Reference Tag
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Directs drawings to specific interior elevation views.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Arrowhead pointing to the elevation direction with a coordinate circle.

drawable_symbols.name: Revision Cloud Tag
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Directs drawing view to revised segments.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Standard delta symbol: equilateral triangle enclosing a revision number.

drawable_symbols.name: Detail Callout Marker
drawable_symbols.architecturalUse: Refers drawing reader to larger scale detail sheets.
drawable_symbols.similarityWarning: Standard drafting format: circle split horizontally by a dividing line.

ui_command_icons.name: Nearest Snap
ui_command_icons.tooltip: Snap to nearest point on line
ui_command_icons.ariaLabel: Snap to nearest point on line
